spk_a.transcript: 包括你的什么恩师, 什么靠山, 什么同党，是英雄好汉都站出来。

spk_b.transcript: 臣不是英雄好汉，臣也没有同党。

qa_result.question: According to the conversation content, what is the reply from other speakers to a certain speaker's statement that "包括你的什么恩师, 什么靠山, 什么同党，是英雄好汉都站出来。"?
options: A. the second speaker: This subject is no hero, and this subject has no accomplices.
B. the second speaker: You still claim this is a congratulatory memorial now.
C. the second speaker: Your humble subject would never dare to deceive Your Majesty, there is absolutely no accomplice behind me giving instructions.
D. Cannot judge (Insufficient information to locate the corresponding reply)
qa_result.answer_text: This subject is no hero, and this subject has no accomplices.

qa_result.question: Based on the conversation content, what is the reply sentence made by another speaker to the utterance of a certain speaker from 12.1s to 14.1s?
options: A. the second speaker: Hai Rui is the chief of the Ministry of Household Affairs under my supervision.
B. the second speaker: What a sharp tongue you have.
C. the second speaker: Your Majesty, Hai Rui is the chief of the Armory Department under the Ministry of War.
D. Cannot be determined (insufficient information to locate the reply)
qa_result.answer_text: Hai Rui is the chief of the Ministry of Household Affairs under my supervision.

qa_result.question: The following is a monologue clip from a speaker. Which of the options is the most probable response to this utterance in the complete conversation?
options: A. the second speaker: All my life I have always been fond of heroes and brave men!

D. Cannot judge (insufficient information to locate the response)
qa_result.answer_text: This subject went to his house in person to get it.
